items.title: Global insurance broker Aon tests stablecoin payments with Coinbase, Paxos
items.whyYouShouldCare: Aon's exploration of stablecoin payments could enhance the legitimacy and adoption of digital currencies in traditional finance, potentially benefiting Solana's ecosystem.

items.title: Solana Market Cap Jumps $5B, Can SOL Reclaim $100 as Mutuum Finance V1 Protocol Hits $200M TVL?
items.whyYouShouldCare: The increase in Solana's market cap and the success of Mutuum Finance may signal growing investor confidence and increased liquidity in the SOL market.

items.title: Jito Foundation acquires SolanaFloor days after platform shutdown
items.whyYouShouldCare: The acquisition of SolanaFloor by the Jito Foundation suggests a commitment to strengthening Solana's application ecosystem, which could drive user engagement and platform growth.
